---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to mozart or a specialist
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What behavior, gap, or friction point is this request addressing? Link any related issues.

## The proposed change

What should change? Which file(s) does this touch?

- [ ] `agents/mozart.md` (conductor behavior)
- [ ] `agents/PIPELINE.md` (pipeline reference)
- [ ] A specific specialist persona (which one?)
- [ ] `INTEGRATION.md` (ticketing/docs surface)
- [ ] `commands/mozart.md` (slash command)
- [ ] `README.md` or docs
- [ ] CI / OSS hygiene
- [ ] Other: ___

## Why this

What does it enable that isn't possible today? What's the cost of not doing it?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why does your proposal win?

## Scope

- [ ] Persona-only change (one agent file)
- [ ] Cross-cutting change (multiple agents or PIPELINE.md)
- [ ] New agent (use the new-agent proposal template instead)
- [ ] New pipeline shape or partial flow
- [ ] New ticketing or documentation surface
- [ ] Other: ___
